steps.title: Use the stakeholder ranking
steps.content: The planner wants advertisements aimed at stakeholders to emphasize enhancement of pollination. In the table, stakeholders rank pollination 7, which is higher than the other listed stakeholder service rankings.

steps.title: Reject wrong comparisons
steps.content: Choice B compares soil erosion between stakeholders and project leaders, not pollination's importance to stakeholders. Choice C compares pollination across groups rather than within stakeholder priorities. Choice D reverses the ranking between carbon sequestration and pollination.

steps.title: Match the strongest support
steps.content: The supported data point is that stakeholders ranked enhancement of pollination higher than the other four services shown, making it logical to emphasize that benefit to them. The answer is A.
